results.alt:
Velmora was born from a simple belief: that fine jewelry should be accessible, 
              wearable, and made to last. Every piece is crafted with care using 18K gold plating 
              over hypoallergenic materials, designed to move with you from morning coffee to evening out. Our Story

Velmora was founded with a singular vision: to make fine jewelry accessible without 
              compromising on quality or design. We believe every woman deserves to wear pieces that 
              feel luxurious, look timeless, and last through life's moments. Our Story
